description: Five representative deck layouts for slot ground-truth labeling.
note: Fixed slots A1/B1/C1/D1/A3 are recorded as module/trash but are not vision detection targets.

images.hint: Most slots empty; fixed modules on A column may still be present.
Typical mixed layout: modules + plates + colored tip boxes.
Heavily populated; many tip racks and plates across columns.
Sparse: column 2 mostly empty, few tip racks on column 3.
Sparse variant: modules on A column, partial tip/plate fill elsewhere.
